title: 貸し出された計算関数

cases.name: 代表例: contextをthisにして2つの値を計算する

input.factory: () => ({ calc: function(count, extra) { return this.base + this.unit * count + extra; }, records: [{ name: 'alpha', context: { base: 100, unit: 25 }, args: [3, 10] }, { name: 'beta', context: { base: 40, unit: 8 }, args: [5, -5] }] })
() => ({ calc: function(count) { return this.base + count; }, records: [] })

cases.name: argsの3つの値をすべて渡す

input.factory: () => ({ calc: function(width, height, adjust) { return this.base + width * height * this.rate + adjust; }, records: [{ name: 'tile', context: { base: 2, rate: 3 }, args: [4, 5, 1] }, { name: 'panel', context: { base: 10, rate: 2 }, args: [3, 7, -4] }] })

cases.name: record自身ではなくcontextをthisにする

input.factory: () => ({ base: 999, unit: 999, calc: function(count, fee) { return this.base + this.unit * count + fee; }, records: [{ name: 'ctx-a', base: 1000, unit: 1000, context: { base: 5, unit: 4 }, args: [6, 1] }, { name: 'ctx-b', context: { base: 80, unit: 3 }, args: [0, 7] }] })

cases.name: 計算式が違ってもcalcの戻り値を使う

input.factory: () => ({ calc: function(amount, bonus) { return (this.start - amount) * this.scale + bonus; }, records: [{ name: 'north', context: { start: 50, scale: 2 }, args: [8, 1] }, { name: 'south', context: { start: 9, scale: 5 }, args: [2, -3] }] })
